content.en:
Wow!

Long Hai Zhenjun appeared in front of Ye Tian and said, "Little junior brother, are you okay?"

Ye Tian smiled slightly and said, "Senior Brother Longhai, I'm fine, it's just some minor injuries!"

He wasn't joking, although he looked very miserable when he fought with the Ten True Monarchs, but with his recovery speed, he really only had minor injuries left on his body now.

However, in this battle, he consumed a lot, even if he secretly used the innate origin to recover, it was impossible to recover all, but as long as he turned back and healed a little, he could recover to his peak.

At this moment, the entrance to the ruins of Black Wind Mountain opened.

"Senior Brother Longhai, I am willing to give up half of the quota for this relic and let the Void Heaven Hall arrange it, I don't know if it's possible?"

Ye Tiandao.

"That's enough!" Long Hai Zhenjun said: "Many of the races under the command of the Void Heaven Hall are basically some innate races, and there are very few geniuses at the galaxy level, and they are basically geniuses of the Terran race, so I only need one-third of the quota is enough, and the rest are for the Terrans, and the strength of the Void Heaven Temple will naturally increase!"

He didn't bother with the quota issue, after all, the Terran was also one of the subordinate forces of the Void Heaven Temple, not to mention that the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi was also a Terran, so he naturally wouldn't be too difficult for Ye Tian.

"Okay, then give one-third of the quota to the Void Heaven Palace!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, Longhai Zhenjun gathered a group of galaxy-level geniuses here one after another and sent them here.

In fact, quite a few of these galaxy-level geniuses are very ordinary cultivators, but they have a relationship, such as some of the descendants of the True Monarch!

After many True Monarchs in the Void Heaven Hall entered the Quasi-Dao Realm, many people married many wives, although it was quite difficult for True Monarchs to give birth to descendants, but as long as they paid some price, they could still give birth to descendants.

From generation to generation, some true monarchs have formed a huge family.

Therefore, it is not very difficult to gather 30,000 galaxy-level juniors.

Moreover, more than 30,000 galaxy-level juniors can be sent every hundred years, which is too much, and there is no need to snatch it at all.

On the Terran side, according to strict regulations, you must be a genius to get a place to enter the ruins of Black Wind Mountain.

Soon after, 100,000 people entered the ruins.

A few years later, 100,000 people came out of the ruins, and each of them had become extremely powerful in their bloodlines and talents.

However, everyone's degree of transformation is different, most of them have just changed from ordinary little geniuses to real geniuses, and only a few have transformed into geniuses who are enough to grow to the level of six or seven star god generals.

As for the genius at the level of the eight-star god general, it is almost difficult to elevate it with external objects, after all, the eight-star god general is almost a genius of the level of the core disciple or true disciple of the top big power.

But you can't underestimate those six- or seven-star god generals, after all, these geniuses will all be middle-level figures in the Void Sky in the future.

What's more, the more geniuses there are, there will always be a few real demon-level geniuses.

......

Ye Tian did not return to his territory, but has been studying the waist order of the small leader of the Black Wind Mountain here, and this is the entrance to the ruins of the Black Wind Mountain, if you study here, you can understand the formation prohibition of this relic faster.

With the passage of time, the ruins of the Black Wind Mountain opened again and again, countless geniuses were born, and the Void Heaven Temple had already surpassed other forces at the bottom.

this day.

Ye Tian suddenly burst out laughing.

"Finally, I can completely communicate with the relics space where Black Wind Mountain is located!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

He now basically understood why cultivators above the Cosmic God were not allowed to enter the Black Wind Mountain Ruins space, it was not that Black Wind Mountain deliberately set it up like this, but that the entrance to the Black Wind Mountain Ruins happened to be inside a building somewhere in Black Wind Mountain where only the Cosmic God was allowed to enter.

Therefore, it only needs to build another spatial passage to the rest of the Black Wind Mountain Ruins space to allow the True Monarchs to enter.

And now, he has the confidence to build such a teleportation formation, but this teleportation formation needs to use the formation of the Black Wind Mountain Ruins, so that the two sets of formations attract each other, generating spatial fluctuations, thus giving birth to an unstable passage.

Such a passage would definitely not be able to accommodate too many people to enter, but Ye Tian only needed to enter by himself.

Anyway, this ruin is not very large, and if he can enter it, he can definitely completely sweep away the value of this ruin.

Next, Ye Tian began to continuously set up the formation, and took out a lot of precious materials.

After thousands of years, Ye Tiancai finally succeeded in arranging the formation.

--------------

"I hope we can really create an unstable space passage according to the ideal!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.

Bang!!!!

The opening of the large array caused huge fluctuations, but Ye Tian had already prepared and used the Golden Eye Realm to completely suppress the anomaly here, plus there was no one around here, so no one knew what Ye Tian was doing.

Soon, the large array began to gradually stabilize.

Soon after, a spatial fluctuation was created.

"It's a success!" Ye Tian said in surprise when he saw this scene.

Immediately, Ye Tian fluctuated along the space and shuttled into a mysterious space.

The remains of Black Wind Mountain, on top of a mountain peak.

Ye Tian appeared here, and immediately swept his divine sense, and finished exploring this space.

This space is only about a million kilometers, and there are a total of six buildings, each of which belongs to six peaks.

Five of the peaks were in ruins, and even the buildings on them were in ruins.

Seeing this, Ye Tian confirmed that this was the ruins of the Black Wind Mountain that those Terran disciples had said.

"It's really in!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

There is not much space here, Ye Tian probed the mountain peaks one by one, and also found the dilapidated building where the blood pool was located.

It's just that the formation prohibition on this building only allows creatures below the cosmic god to enter, Ye Tian can't enter at all, and if he keeps attacking the formation base with his strength, this broken formation may be damaged.

But Ye Tian didn't dare to do this, for fear of causing something bad, in case he destroyed the blood pool, it would be bad, it would be tantamount to ruining a major opportunity for the human race and the hope of rising in the future.

Therefore, he did not attack the formation of the Blood Pool Building, but put his mind on another relatively complete building.

This is a large hall building, and it has the domain boundary text written on it - Little Wind King Palace!

The Little Wind King Hall should be more important than other buildings, not only is the building larger, but the mountain peak it is located on is also higher and more majestic, and the formation above it is also more powerful.

From this point, it can be seen that the Little Wind King Hall is not an ordinary place, perhaps the residence of a big man in Black Wind Mountain.

Although the building of the Little Wind King Hall was not damaged, the formation on it was seriously damaged, and it should be that resisting the attack caused a big problem in the formation of the Little Wind King Palace.

Coupled with the passage of time, the formation here is very unstable.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian tried to attack, but the blow did not break the formation.

He was not surprised, after all, the grade of this building was not low, and the Black Wind Mountain was not simple, if it was a complete formation, he estimated that he would not want to shake it even if it was a hundred million years.

But now, although he didn't break the formation with a single blow, he at least had hope.

Because just now, he shook the formation!

Boom Boom Boom !!!

Ye Tian attacked several times in a row, roughly confirming the endurance of the formation.

"It will take about ten days to attack in a row, and you can break the formation!"

Ye Tian estimated.
